case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. PABLO ALBERTO CHAN CANTE

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CANTE, PABLO ALBERTO CHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED JUN-11-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CANTE, PABLO ALBERTO CHAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-27-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANTE, PABLO ALBERTO CHAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2018 BY PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
